samples.text: If the battery is charged, then the phone turns on. The battery is charged. Does it follow that the phone turns on?
Whenever the battery is charged, the phone turns on as a result. In this case the battery is charged. Can we conclude that the phone turns on?
If the battery is powered up, then the phone powers on. The battery is powered up. Does it follow that the phone powers on?
The condition for 'the phone turns on' is met because the battery is charged. Does it follow that the phone turns on?
If the battery is charged, then the phone turns on. The battery is charged. A blue car is parked outside. Does it follow that the phone turns on?
